required_fields.label: Tagline or headline
required_fields.placeholder: A compelling one-liner that captures what you do

required_fields.label: Value proposition
required_fields.placeholder: In 2-3 sentences, what do you do and why does it matter to your target customer?

required_fields.label: Target audience for this one-pager
required_fields.placeholder: e.g., VCs, enterprise buyers, potential partners, conference attendees

required_fields.label: Key features or offerings
required_fields.placeholder: List your top 3-4 product features, service capabilities, or key offerings...

optional_fields.label: Traction metrics or proof points
optional_fields.placeholder: Revenue, customer count, growth rate, awards, press mentions...

optional_fields.label: Market opportunity
optional_fields.placeholder: Brief description of the market size or opportunity...

optional_fields.label: Notable customers or partners
optional_fields.placeholder: Names of recognizable customers or partners...

optional_fields.label: Call to action
optional_fields.placeholder: What do you want the reader to do? e.g., Schedule a demo, Visit website

file_upload_prompts.label: Upload brand guidelines, logo, or color palette
Upload any existing one-pagers or marketing materials for reference
Upload product screenshots or images to include

sections.label: Headline
sections.instructions: A bold, attention-grabbing headline that communicates the core value proposition in one line.

sections.label: Value Proposition
sections.instructions: 2-3 sentences explaining what you do, who you serve, and why you are the best choice. Must be instantly understandable.

sections.label: Problem / Solution
sections.instructions: Brief, punchy description of the problem and how you solve it. Use contrast to make the before/after clear.

sections.label: Key Features
sections.instructions: 3-4 bullet points, each with a short title and one-line description. Focus on benefits, not technical specs.

sections.label: Traction / Proof Points
sections.instructions: 2-3 compelling metrics or proof points that build credibility. Use large numbers and specific outcomes.

sections.label: Market Opportunity
sections.instructions: One-line market size statement with source. Keep it high-impact and easy to absorb.

sections.label: Call to Action
sections.instructions: Clear next step with contact information. What should the reader do right now?
